title: × Dactylocamptis chassagnei
taxonomy: × Dactylocamptis chassagnei is a genus of orchids. × Dactylocamptis chassagnei is a hybrid orchid within the subtribe Orchidinae. The classification of × Dactylocamptis chassagnei involves its assignment to the family Orchidaceae. × Dactylocamptis chassagnei is typically classified as part of the genus Dactylorhiza. The specific classification of × Dactylocamptis chassagnei is Dactylorhiza maculata × Dactylorhiza sambucina.

intro: × Dactylocamptis chassagnei is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from a cross between Dactylorhiza maculata and Spiranthes aestivalis. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, potentially providing relief from conditions such as arthritis, ulcers, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of × Dactylocamptis chassagnei include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or ointment to leverage its health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
